response.step_by_step_log: I identified two songs performed by Hololive VTubers. The on-screen text for the first song was 'とくべつ、して' (Tokubetsu, shite) and for the second was 'ぱぴぷぺPOP!' (Papi Pupe POP!). Both listed '玉響2060%' (TamaYura 2060%) as the creators for lyrics and composition. I attempted to search for lyrics for both songs using the titles and the artist name, but no reliable, comprehensive lyric sources were returned. Therefore, the lyrics fields are set to null.
response.global_summary: The video features a two-song performance by Hololive VTubers. The first song, 'Tokubetsu, shite', is performed from 00:00 to 03:57. The second song, 'Papi Pupe POP!', is performed from 03:58 to 04:58.

scenes.description: Hololive VTubers perform the song 'Tokubetsu, shite'. On-screen text indicates the title and creators.
scenes.performer_in_video: Natsuiro Matsuri, Sakamata Chloe, Yukihana Lamy, Shishiro Botan, Momosuzu Nene

scenes.description: Hololive VTubers perform the song 'Papi Pupe POP!'. On-screen text indicates the title and creators.
